chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl.Misc.Appln.No. S – 850 of 2023. Date Order with signature of Judge For Hearing of main case. - 12-01-2024. Mr.Mansoor Hussain Maitlo Advocate for applicant. Mr.Sardar Ali Shah Addl.P.G. - ZULIFQUAR ALI SANGI, J- Through this miscellaneous application, applicant Ahmeduddin has assailed the order dated 11.09.2023 passed by the learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Nara, whereby the report under Section 173, Cr.P.C filed by the Investigating Officer in Crime No.82 of 2023 Police Station, Sorah for disposing of a case under ‘B’ Class, was accepted. 2. Heard arguments of the learned counsel for the parties and perused the material available on record. 3. After going through the impugned order, it reveals that the learned trial Court has discussed each and every aspect of the case while disposing of a summary report filed by the Investigating Officer under Section 173, Cr.P.C, as such no illegality or infirmity has been committed by the learned trial Court, therefore the same does not call for any interference by this Court. In these circumstances, while maintaining the impugned order the application filed by the applicant (Criminal Miscellaneous Application No. S – 850 of 2023) is hereby dismissed. JUDGE Akber.
